title: Touch Grass
description: Touch a random block every 5 minutes or die.
body:
Every 5 minutes a random block is chosen, all players must then step on that block before the timer runs out! If they fail to do so, they die!



Features:

- A timer at the bottom constantly counting down
- 52 random blocks for a real challenge!
- /cooldown command to change the length of each round in ticks
- /reset command to reset to the default cooldown of 300 seconds (5 min) and set the time remaining to 5 min
